body.title: find_tool fuzzy lookup
body.result: Added find_tool(query,limit=5) registered tool in memory_query.py — keyword overlap with underscore-splitting against tool names+descriptions. find_tool('search memory') → memory_search. Resolves the search_memory vs memory_search class of confusion.
body.description: Igor hallucinated wrong tool name; add find_tool(query) registered tool doing keyword overlap against tool names+descriptions so approximate names resolve
